_comment: Surgical strip of unverified stay names from destinations.solo_female_note. Each entry: find/replace pair applied to the destination's note. Pattern: keep structural advice (state-tourism brand, operator category) but drop specific property names not in our DB. Generated 2026-04-22 from scripts/audit-solo-female-notes.mjs.

rewrites.find: Rainforest Resort + KTDC are the safe stays
rewrites.replace: KTDC property is the safe stay

rewrites.find: Tibetan-run guesthouses (Zostel Bir, Colonel's Resort) are safe
organised tour + Apar Retreat hotel
KMVN rest house + Chaukori Retreat are the safe stays
rewrites.replace: KMVN rest house is the safe stay

rewrites.find: camp-style stays only, pre-booked (Brahmakamal Camps, Monal)
rewrites.replace: camp-style stays only, pre-booked via a registered operator

rewrites.find: organised rafting (Kali River Camp, Hornbill River Resort)
Organised operator (Tiger Haven, Jaagir Lodge) recommended over self-book
Organised operator (Mountainface, Gurez Lodge) is the only format
rewrites.replace: Organised operator is the only format

rewrites.find: MPTDC Hotel Kalchuri + Hotel Narmada Jacksons
Jibhi Cafe + Artists Lodge + Chalet Silvan are women-owned
rewrites.replace: a small cluster of women-owned homestays

rewrites.find: KSTDC Mayura + Saguna Resort
HPTDC Kinner Kailash + Kalpa Retreat are the picks
rewrites.replace: HPTDC Kinner Kailash is the pick

rewrites.find: glamping operators (Club Mahindra, Kanatal Villas) are resort-style, safe
rewrites.replace: registered glamping operators are resort-style and safe

rewrites.find: Dovipie Inn + homestays (women-led conservation co-op)
Russian Inn + KTDC are reliable
Kohima Camp + Razhu Pru homestays are vetted
rewrites.replace: Razhu Pru and similar community homestays are vetted

rewrites.find: Thin stays; Kurumba Village + PRT Palace are the picks
rewrites.replace: Thin stays; go through a registered Nilgiri operator

rewrites.find: Zostel Plus + Hotel Grand Dragon + Omasila homestay family-run
rewrites.replace: Zostel Plus and Omasila homestay are family-run

rewrites.find: MTDC Hotel Plaza + Lonar Tourist Lodge
community guides + women-run Mawphlang Homestay
Organised Nagaland-Tourism tour (Konyak Tea Retreat) only
IIVRI guesthouse + Mountain Trail Resort
Stay in Rajgir (Indo Hokke, Rajgir Residency), which is female-safe
rewrites.replace: Stay in Rajgir at a registered hotel, which is female-safe

rewrites.find: MPTDC's Betwa Retreat + Sheesh Mahal are female-safe
MPTDC Champak + Hotel Rock End are female-safe
Stay in Fontainhas B&Bs, not the Miramar stretch after dark
rewrites.replace: Stay in the Fontainhas quarter, not the Miramar stretch after dark

rewrites.find: Ladakh Tourism-registered camps (Pangong Retreat, Nature's Nest)
APTDC circuit houses + Siang House Resort are organised
KMVN rest house + Hotel Ulka
HPTDC hut + Pragati Lodge at Kanda
Rajgir Residency + Indo Hokke hotels
KMVN + Moon Resort are safe
STDC + Mountain Retreat Hotel
Govt-run Toran Hill Resort is the safest pick
rewrites.replace: a Gujarat Tourism-run property is the safest pick

rewrites.find: the Bhimakali Palace Hotel is trust-run, women-safe, clean
rewrites.replace: the Bhimakali temple-trust accommodation is women-safe and clean

rewrites.find: organised operator only (Mahanadi Riverside Lodge)
Chhuti Holiday Resort + Ananda Retreat
Sirpur Resort + CTDC cottages
HPTDC + Sissu Lake Resort are safe overnight
registered operators only (WBTDC, Sundarban Residency)
rewrites.replace: registered operators only (WBTDC and permit-licensed private operators)

rewrites.find: MTDC + luxury lodges (Svasara, Bamboo Forest Lodge) are safe
rewrites.replace: MTDC + registered luxury lodges are safe

rewrites.find: Raju's Cottage + Himalayan Trout House are the female-safe homestays
Turtuk Holiday Resort + Lchang Nang homestay are female-safe
Blackbuck Lodge is the female-safe overnight
rewrites.replace: a registered wildlife lodge is the female-safe overnight
